title: AI Yearbook 90s
description: Uses the default AI provider to turn a photo into an authentic 1990s yearbook portrait.
positive_prompt: Transform the input photo into an authentic 1990s American high school yearbook portrait. Preserve the subject's identity, age impression, facial structure, eye direction, expression, hairstyle silhouette, and natural skin texture. Reframe only as needed into a centered head-and-shoulders school portrait with a blue-gray studio gradient backdrop, soft flash lighting, slightly warm film tones, subtle 90s styling, and a clean professional yearbook finish.
negative_prompt: cartoon, anime, illustration, painting, CGI, 3D render, changed identity, different age, asymmetrical eyes, distorted face, low resolution, blurry, extra fingers, extra limbs, cropped head, modern fashion, futuristic clothing, cyberpunk, text, watermark, logo, overexposed, underexposed, heavy makeup, extreme beauty filter, duplicated features, bad anatomy, noise, artifacts
custom_prompt_placeholder: e.g. senior portrait, blue laser backdrop...
